examples: Pry up that stone with a pickax.
The utility model relates an improved structure of a fertilizing and seeding pickax.
The logo for Kirk Miller's debonair menswear label, Miller's Oath, is a pickax.
The white-haired bushy browed geologist, who immigrated to South Africa more than 50 years ago, packs a pickax, a few other tools, and some tea when he heads out to rocky bush country.
